title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MASALISI IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEMERY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5214 / 53 OG No. 16, 5138 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1694, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MASALISI IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEMERY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Masalisi is separated from the barrio of Payapa, Municipality of Lemery, Province of Batangas, and constituted into a barrio in the said municipality to be known as the barrio of Masalisi.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approval June 20, 1957.
